options: The mean of all pair-wise distances between clusters
The distance between the two root nodes
quiz.answer: The mean of all pair-wise distances between clusters

quiz.q: What is the primary difference between K-Means and K-Medoids?
options: K-Means is supervised, K-Medoids is not

It doesn't require a distance metric
quiz.answer: It is less sensitive to noise and outliers

quiz.q: What is a 'Medoid'?
options: The average of all points in a cluster

A point furthest from the cluster center

quiz.answer: A central data point in a cluster whose sum of distances to other points is minimal

quiz.q: In Random Forest classification, how is the final class determined?
options: The result of the first tree

quiz.q: In Scikit-Learn, what does the .fit() method do?
options: It calculates parameters (like mean, std) from the training data
quiz.answer: It calculates parameters (like mean, std) from the training data

quiz.q: What does the .transform() method do?
options: It applies the learned transformation (like scaling) to the data
quiz.answer: It applies the learned transformation (like scaling) to the data

quiz.q: When do you use .fit_transform()?
options: On training data to both learn and apply parameters in one step
quiz.answer: On training data to both learn and apply parameters in one step

quiz.q: What is 'Feature Extraction'?
options: Creating new features from raw data to improve model performance
quiz.answer: Creating new features from raw data to improve model performance

quiz.q: Which is an example of Feature Extraction in Image Processing?
What is 'Feature Scaling'?
options: Adjusting the range of features so they are on a similar scale (e.g., 0 to 1)
quiz.answer: Adjusting the range of features so they are on a similar scale (e.g., 0 to 1)

quiz.q: Why is it important to use .transform() on test data instead of .fit_transform()?
options: To prevent data leakage from test set to training set
Because test data has no labels
quiz.answer: To prevent data leakage from test set to training set

quiz.answer: To prevent overfitting by penalizing large coefficients

options: Lasso (it can shrink coefficients to zero)

quiz.q: Mean Squared Error (MSE) is the average of:
options: Squared differences between actual and predicted values
quiz.answer: Squared differences between actual and predicted values

quiz.q: Accuracy is defined as:

options: When the data is perfectly balanced
When dealing with imbalanced datasets (e.g., 99% class A, 1% class B)
quiz.answer: When dealing with imbalanced datasets (e.g., 99% class A, 1% class B)

quiz.q: Recall (Sensitivity) measures:
options: Out of all predicted positives, how many were actually positive?
Out of all actual positives, how many did we correctly identify?
quiz.answer: Out of all actual positives, how many did we correctly identify?

quiz.q: Precision measures:
options: Out of all actual positives, how many were identified?
Out of all predicted positives, how many were correctly predicted?
quiz.answer: Out of all predicted positives, how many were correctly predicted?

quiz.answer: The sum of distances of all points to the medoid

options: Analyzing which products customers buy together
quiz.answer: Analyzing which products customers buy together

quiz.q: In Association Rules, what is 'Support'?
options: How frequently an itemset appears in the dataset
quiz.answer: How frequently an itemset appears in the dataset

quiz.q: In Association Rules, what is 'Confidence'?
options: The probability of the model being correct
How often the rule is found to be true (e.g., if A is bought, how likely is B?)
quiz.answer: How often the rule is found to be true (e.g., if A is bought, how likely is B?)

quiz.q: What is 'Lift' in Association Rules?
options: The ratio of the observed support to that expected if items were independent
quiz.answer: The ratio of the observed support to that expected if items were independent

quiz.q: If Lift > 1, it means the items are:
options: Positively associated (A bought increases chance of B)
quiz.answer: Positively associated (A bought increases chance of B)
